summary: Promoted Linear GraphQL reads must use POST /graphql, and issue label workflows must preserve team ownership so agents only attach labels valid for the target team.
reason: Linear rejects GET /graphql with CSRF/preflight errors, and team-owned issue labels are not portable across Linear teams. Without these guards, agents guess failing read syntax and can create/edit issues with label UUIDs from the wrong team.
validated_outcome: Focused tests cover POST-only promoted GraphQL reads, team-filtered label discovery from live/local sources, cross-team label rejection before issueCreate, and sync persistence of label team ownership.
